overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing third-person vehicle driving through Night City at dusk. The camera follows a pink-lit truck navigating from elevated highways through commercial districts to industrial zones with cooling towers, featuring the game's signature neon-lit cyberpunk aesthetic with the Arasaka tower visible in the background throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approach with concrete retaining walls

events.description: pedestrian crosses the road from left to right in front of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: driving forward on an elevated highway approach, maintaining steady speed toward the storage facility

notable_agents.action: crossing the road from left to right in front of the vehicle

entered.detail: massive illuminated skyscraper dominating the skyline, visible throughout the city
tall concrete barriers lining both sides of the elevated roadway
large green neon sign reading 'STORAGE' mounted above the facility entrance
illuminated advertisement panel with red and white graphics
tall pole with horizontal LED light fixture

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along an elevated highway approach flanked by concrete retaining walls, heading toward a storage facility marked by a prominent green neon sign. The massive cylindrical tower looms in the distance against a dusky sky, while a pedestrian suddenly crosses the road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage facility entrance transitioning to underpass

events.description: vehicle makes a sharp right turn at the storage facility entrance
enters covered underpass beneath highway overpass, lighting dims significantly

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the storage facility then proceeding under a highway overpass

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving in the opposite direction, passing under the overpass

entered.detail: low industrial building with the green neon storage sign mounted on top
elevated concrete highway with support pillars spanning across the road
low concrete divider along the left side of the road
safety railing along the edge of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at the storage facility entrance, passing the building with its green neon signage, then enters a dimly lit underpass beneath a massive highway overpass. The cylindrical tower shifts to the left of the frame as the environment becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with commercial buildings

events.description: passing other vehicles while maintaining speed along the arterial road

agents.ego_description: cruising along a multi-lane arterial road with moderate traffic, passing palm trees and commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: red truck driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: tall palm tree lining the street, characteristic of the city's aesthetic
modern glass and steel structure with illuminated windows
vertical traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass onto a wide arterial road, the vehicle navigates through light traffic lined with palm trees and modern commercial buildings. The cylindrical tower stands prominently ahead while streetlights and traffic signals illuminate the dusk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with gas station and underpass

events.description: vehicle makes a right turn at the Valencia street intersection
passes under another highway overpass entering industrial district

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at the intersection, passing a gas station with yellow neon trim, then proceeding under an overpass

notable_agents.action: walking along the sidewalk near the gas station entrance

entered.detail: low roof structure with yellow neon accent lighting covering fuel pumps
red street sign with white text indicating 'Valencia' street name
tall plain concrete barrier wall along the roadside
low utilitarian structure with minimal windows and industrial lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at the Valencia street intersection, passing a gas station with distinctive yellow neon lighting, then drives under another highway overpass. The environment transitions from commercial to industrial, with concrete walls replacing glass storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with cooling towers and heavy infrastructure

events.description: passing massive industrial cooling towers with graffiti and red warning lights

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial zone, passing beneath elevated highways and alongside massive cooling towers

entered.detail: massive hyperboloid cooling towers covered in colorful graffiti with red aviation warning lights at the top
large diameter industrial piping and scaffolding structures
large parabolic satellite antennas visible on distant buildings
massive illuminated advertisement showing a vehicle with red text pricing
metal framework and industrial equipment along the building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a sprawling industrial district dominated by massive graffiti-covered cooling towers with red warning lights. Elevated highways crisscross overhead while large neon billboards and satellite dishes punctuate the background. The cylindrical tower remains visible in the distance between industrial structures, creating a layered urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle travels from an elevated highway through a commercial district and into a sprawling industrial zone at dusk. It begins on a highway approach flanked by concrete walls, moving toward a storage facility with a green neon sign while a distant cylindrical tower looms against the sky. As the vehicle turns right and enters a dimly lit underpass, the environment becomes enclosed before emerging onto a wide arterial road lined with palm trees and modern commercial buildings. The scene then shifts at the Valencia street intersection, passing a yellow-lit gas station and another overpass as glass storefronts give way to concrete industrial walls. Finally, the camera follows the vehicle into a district dominated by graffiti-covered cooling towers with red warning lights, where elevated highways and neon billboards create a layered urban landscape with the cylindrical tower still visible in the distance.
